criteria: Our rankings blend season-best performances, consistency across Diamond League and major championship appearances, head-to-head matchup records, and overall depth of the competitive field faced. Rankings update every Monday through the outdoor season.

events.name: 1500m
events.description: The metric mile — where tactics meet speed. The most unpredictable event on the track.

events.name: 100m
events.description: The fastest humans alive. No tactics — just who finds another gear in the last 30 meters.

events.name: Marathon
events.description: 26.2 miles of attrition. Where consistency over the full season separates the contenders from the pretenders.

events.name: 800m
events.description: The brutal half-mile. Speed endurance at its most punishing — and most exciting.
